column1: # MHONGOOSE/MeerKAT: NGC3621 rotation curve from Sorgho+2019 (MNRAS 482, 1248)
# 3D BAROLO fit to MeerKAT HI commissioning data
# Distance: 6.6 Mpc (Freedman+2001), Inclination: 64.0 deg (3D BAROLO avg)
# L_3.6 from de Blok+2008: log(M_star) ~ 10.0 (est from M/L=0.50 × L)
# ISO halo (M/L fixed=0.50): rho_0 = 14.9e-3 Msun/pc^3, r_c = 4.8 kpc, chi2_red = 2.0
# NFW (M/L fixed=0.50): r200 = 162.7 kpc, c = 5.3, chi2_red = 2.4
# Digitized from Figure 13 (left panel, 3D BAROLO) and Figure 16 (ISO model top panel)
# Note: ring width ~2 kpc, data extends to ~50 kpc
